hero.headline:
Shaping ideas.
Adding value to the city.
hero.subtext:
From silk screen printing, large format inkjet, cutting,
to sign & display fabrication, we provide comprehensive services.

philosophy.title: Management Philosophy
philosophy.subtitle: Philosophy
philosophy.text:
Cherishing this philosophy, we walk together with our clients, partners, local communities, and colleagues, sharing the value of craftsmanship.

By facing each task with sincerity and continuously refining our skills, we deliver quality that exceeds expectations.

silk.title: Silk Screen Printing
silk.desc: Suitable for printing that requires spot color expression and high durability. We provide highly accurate printing tailored to your needs.

inkjet.title: Large Format Inkjet Printing
inkjet.desc: We produce large format prints that combine high visibility and appeal, such as posters, panels, and storefront decorations.

cutting.title: Cutting
cutting.desc: We accommodate cutting processes precisely tailored to various applications such as window signs and vehicle markings.

signs.title: Sign & Display Fabrication
signs.desc: Comprehensive support from planning to production and installation. We shape sign spaces that bring out the charm of your store or facility.

strengths.title: Our Strengths
strengths.subtitle: Strengths
strengths.desc:
From planning to installation, we pursue high precision and sincerity in everything we do.
Combining the latest technology with skilled craftsmanship to shape your vision.
strengths.list1: Comprehensive support from printing to sign installation
strengths.list2: Flexible and polite responses typical of a small elite team
strengths.list3: Trust and track record built closely with the community
strengths.list4: Unwavering commitment to beautiful finishes and quality

recruit.title: Careers
recruit.desc: Inexperienced applicants welcome. We welcome those who are interested in manufacturing and value meticulous work. Grow your career with us.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.desc:
Please feel free to contact us regarding production consultations, quotes, or recruitment inquiries.
We accept inquiries by phone or via our form.

silk.title: Silk Screen Printing
silk.desc:
Ideal for printing requiring detailed color expression (such as PANTONE or DIC) or high durability outdoors.
Direct printing is possible not only on paper but on a wide variety of materials including plastic, metal, glass, and fabric.
With our years of experience and skill, we provide highly accurate and beautiful finishes.

inkjet.title: Large Format Inkjet Printing
inkjet.desc:
From posters, exhibition panels, and storefront wall decorations to banners, we accept large format output from a single piece.
Using high-quality inkjet printers for expressive color reproduction, we quickly deliver products with high visibility and appeal.

cutting.title: Cutting
cutting.desc:
A processing technology that accurately cuts films and sheets along a specified shape.
Widely used for store window signs, vehicle markings, frosted glass films in offices, and informational displays.
With our precise cutting technology, we create beautiful letters and logos down to the finest detail.

signs.title: Sign & Display / Signboard Fabrication
signs.desc:
We offer total support from the planning and production of signs that maximize the charm of your space to on-site installation.
We propose optimal materials and structures tailored to your application and environment, including wall-mounted signs, standalone signs, cut-out letters, and illuminated ones.
Through installations combining safety and design, we shape your vision.

step1.title: Inquiries & Consultations
step1.desc: Please let us know your thoughts and requests by phone or through our form.

step2.title: Meetings & Site Surveys
step2.desc: We will visit the site if necessary to check the installation environment and conduct detailed hearings.

step3.title: Proposals & Estimates
step3.desc: We will select the optimal specifications and materials, and submit a production plan and estimate.

step4.title: Production & Processing
step4.desc: At our own factory, skilled craftsmen carefully produce and process each item one by one.

step5.title: Installation & Delivery
step5.desc: We perform installations placing safety first, and hand over the product after your confirmation.

cta.title: Looking to consult about production?
cta.desc: Please feel free to contact us with any quote requests or questions.

intro.title: Message
intro.subtitle: Message
intro.text:
Since our founding in November 1973, Hatano Screen Printing Co., Ltd. has been based in Nagoya, handling silk screen printing, large format inkjet output, cutting, and the production and installation of signs & displays.

While cherishing the technology and experience cultivated over many years, we constantly pursue new expressions and value that suit the times.
We want to be a partner who not only produces but shapes your thoughts and connects them to communicative results.

philosophy.title: Philosophy
philosophy.subtitle: Philosophy
philosophy.text:
Cherishing this philosophy, we walk together with our clients, partner companies, local communities, and colleagues, sharing the value of craftsmanship.
By facing each task with sincerity and continuously refining our skills and sensibilities, we deliver expression and quality that exceed expectations.

As a community-based company, we spare no effort in consistently meeting our customers' trust with reliable quality.

table.name: Company Name
table.businessVal: Silk screen printing, large format inkjet printing, cutting, production and installation of signs & displays

intro.title: Share the joy of craftsmanship together.
intro.subtitle: Join Us
intro.text:
At Hatano Screen Printing, we carry out a wide range of tasks from printing to the production and installation of signs and displays.
Experience is not strictly required. We welcome those who have the motivation to learn new skills and value careful handwork.
The things we shape with our hands reach someone as part of the city. Why not do such rewarding work together?

req1.title: Inexperienced are Welcome
req1.desc: Experienced staff will guide you carefully. It's the perfect environment for those who want to acquire a profession from scratch.

req2.title: Those who love making things
req2.desc: Those who find joy in shaping things with their own hands. We are waiting for those interested in printing and making signboards.

req3.title: Those capable of careful work
req3.desc: To shape the thoughts of our customers, we welcome those who can pay attention to details and work steadily and carefully.

req4.title: Looking to work stably in the area
req4.desc: There are no transfers. We support those who want to settle down in Nagoya and work while continuously polishing their skills.

table.workVal: Silk screen printing operations, inkjet router operations, cutting work, sign/signboard production, and on-site assistance etc.
table.qualificationsVal: Educational background/experience not required. Inexperienced applicants welcome. Regular driver's license required (AT allowed)
table.locationVal: 307 Tsurugicho, Nakamura Ward, Nagoya City, Aichi (No transfers)
table.holidaysVal: 2 days off per week (Sat/Sun/Holidays *according to company calendar), Summer, Year-end/New Year, Golden Week holidays
table.salaryVal: To be determined through interview, taking experience and ability into consideration.
table.benefitsVal: Transportation expenses paid, full social insurance, salary increases/bonuses (depending on performance)

apply.title: How to Apply
apply.text:
First, please feel free to contact us via the inquiry form, phone, or email.
We will contact you regarding interviews, etc.
Consultations such as "I just want to hear a story" or "I would like a workplace tour" are also welcome.

contactPage.title: Contact Us
contactPage.subtitle: Contact Us
contactPage.intro:
Please feel free to contact us for various consultations, quote requests, recruitment inquiries, etc.
If you are in a hurry, we also accept inquiries by phone.

form.title: Inquiry Form
form.msgPlaceholder: Please specifically fill out your inquiry details
form.alert: Since this is for demonstration purposes, transmission processing will not be performed.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.subtitle: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.intro: Hatano Screen Printing Co., Ltd. (hereinafter "the Company") establishes the following privacy policy, constructs a mechanism for protecting personal information, and promotes the protection of personal information by ensuring all employees thoroughly recognize the importance of and engage in protecting personal information.

sec1.title: 1. Management of Personal Information
sec1.text: To keep customers' personal information accurate and up-to-date and to prevent unauthorized access, loss, damage, alteration, or leakage, the Company takes necessary measures such as maintaining a security system and developing a management framework, strictly managing personal information.

sec2.title: 2. Purpose of Use of Personal Information
sec2.text: Personal information entrusted to us by customers will be used to send emails or materials as communications from the Company, guidance on our business operations, or answers to questions.

sec3.title: 3. Prohibition of Disclosure and Provision of Personal Information to Third Parties
sec3.text: The Company properly manages personal information entrusted to us by customers and will not disclose personal information to a third party unless one of the following applies:
sec3.list2: When disclosure is necessary based on laws and regulations

sec4.title: 4. Inquiry of the Principal
sec4.text: If a customer wishes to inquire about, correct, or delete their own personal information, we will respond after confirming their identity.
